title: Attribute values containing a semicolon are silently truncated
body: api.mjs's set() builds stringifiedAttributes using attributes[attributeName].split(';')[0], so an attribute value that legitimately contains a semicolon gets truncated instead of being encoded or rejected.

title: get() stops at the first cookie when names collide across paths
body: get(name) in api.mjs breaks out of its loop as soon as it finds a matching name in document.cookie, but browsers can send multiple same-named cookies set on different paths, and there's no way to inspect the others.

title: withAttributes only shallow-merges defaults
body: withAttributes() calls assign({}, this.attributes, attributes), which is a shallow merge, so passing a partial override can unexpectedly clash with unrelated default attributes instead of merging predictably.

title: Default converter doesn't decode '+' as a space
body: converter.mjs's default read converter calls decodeURIComponent directly without first replacing '+' with a space, so cookies set by servers that encode spaces as '+' come back containing literal plus signs.
